content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.63%, Bank Nifty -1.05%, VIX +3.19% to 17.15 — risk-off tone. However IT (+0.81%), select FMCG/Pharma/Capital Goods names showing strong relative strength on Q4 results catalysts. Book is well-positioned with 12 holdings; priority is locking in the COFORGE/PNBHOUSING gains and managing LUPIN which is sitting on its SL.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1066.24,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD effective: SL 1066.24 already trails at -1.9% from CMP 1087, locking in +8.4% from entry 984. Q4 +19% YoY PAT, GNPA <1%, AAA rating optionality. Target 1135 within reach (52w high 1141.90). No SL change needed — current trail is appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Safe-haven hedge given VIX spike +3.19% and broader risk-off tape. CMP 124.30 marginally below entry 125.10. SL 121 below recent support; structural hedge — keep."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 812 to 820 (breakeven). CMP 827.60 = +1% unrealized; SL gap 0.9% — slightly tight but Q4 print is in (PAT +14%, revenue +22%), 52w high broken, Bollinger upper expansion. Move to breakeven removes downside."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1338.68,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.8,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD-equivalent: SL 1338.68 already trails at -1.6% from CMP 1360.30, locking +6.3%. +16.38% today on Q4 beat (PAT 612 vs 261 YoY, USD 1.75B order book). Below 1.0% trail-gap floor would force exit; current 1.6% gap is correct. Target 1450 = +6.6% upside, R:R reasonable. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3025.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 2960 to 3025 (breakeven). CMP 3073.70 = +1.4%; new SL 1.6% below CMP, within trail-gap discipline. FY26 PAT +41.8%, defense order momentum, MoU with Kalyani — thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Trail from 832 to 825 — wait, 832 is ABOVE CMP 840.15 already... rechecking: stored SL 832, CMP 840.15. SL 832 is 1.0% below CMP — at trail-gap floor. Moving to 825 would loosen (rejected). Keep SL at 832; targeting 875 (+4.1%). HOLD effectively — no_op MODIFY avoided. Re-emitting as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1481.20 vs entry 1490 (-0.7%). Q4 PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +310bps. SL 1445 = -2.4% from CMP, appropriate room. Hold to target 1575. Seafarer meet May 13 catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 24,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 2366.20 sitting AT stored SL 2370 (CMP < SL by Rs 4 — SL effectively triggered). Q4 was strong (+87.5% PAT) but stock printed bearish reversal: open 2425 → high 2475 → CMP 2366 (intraday -4.5%). Concall later today is binary catalyst (Rule 11). The SL has been hit; this is not pre-SL panic exit, this is SL-triggered exit. Per Rule 17 check: stored_sl 2370 > cmp 2366.20 → SL is breached. Exit per discipline."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1610.90 vs entry 1618 (-0.4%). Q4 PAT +317% YoY, technical breakout above 1570 confirmed. SL 1580 = -1.9% from CMP, room to run. Hold to target 1740."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 2784 ~ entry 2785 (flat). Q4 PAT +47% FY26, fluorochemical capex doubled. SL 2740 = -1.6% from CMP. Target 2920 valid. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 9020.00,
      "new_target": 9550.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 9000 to 9020 — but |9020-9000|/9000 = 0.22%, below 0.5% micro-adjust threshold. Switching to HOLD — current SL 9000 is fine, 1.4% below CMP 9127, within trail-gap. Re-emit HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 2001.90 vs entry 2015 (-0.5%). Q4 revenue +17.5%, defence segment +46.4% YoY, hit 52w high earlier. SL 1955 = -2.3% from CMP, appropriate. Hold to 2110."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "PERSISTENT",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 0,
      "stop_loss": 0,
      "target": 0,
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SKIPPED — no fresh entry justified given LUPIN exit will free ~Rs 56K cash, deployment dropping to ~52%. Hold powder; afternoon volatility on VIX +3% spike is not the moment to chase."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1066.24,
      "reasoning": "SL trails at -1.9% locking +8.4%. Target 1135 within 4.4%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position; SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "reasoning": "Move to breakeven post-Q4 print."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1338.68,
      "reasoning": "Trail at 1338.68 already locks +6.3%; trail-gap 1.6% appropriate, leave room to run to 1450."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 3025.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL to breakeven; defence thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 832 already 1.0% below CMP 840 (at trail-gap floor); cannot tighten further without risking self-stopout. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat absorbing intraday wobble; SL has -2.4% room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 2370 breached — CMP 2366 < SL. Exit per discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout intact; SL has 1.9% room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2740.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 strong; flat to entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 9000.00,
      "reasoning": "Capital goods leader; SL 1.4% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1955.00,
      "reasoning": "Defence segment +46% YoY; SL 2.3% below CMP."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong Q4 prints across watchlist (THERMAX, DABUR, ASIANPAINT, BAJAJ-AUTO, PERSISTENT) but most are extended +6-16% intraday and chasing into VIX spike is poor risk-reward. Book already has 12 names spanning IT, FMCG, Pharma, Specialty Chem, Capital Goods, BFSI, Defence, Auto-comp — no clear cluster gap that demands a fresh add today. APOLLOTYRE and KPIL have Q4 board meetings May 12-15 — Rule 11 disqualifies fresh entries (3 sessions). NH BEARISH (-0.12 modifier) — pass. INDUSINDBK governance overhang unresolved per Rule 13 — pass. CAMS/PIDILITIND/SRF already held cover the bullish-modifier candidates.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 58%, well below 80% soft target; LUPIN exit will release ~Rs 56K. Cash buffer healthy at 42% — comfortable through VIX spike. Win-rate at 16% over 5 days is concerning but profit-factor 1.3x suggests discipline holding (cutting losers small). LUPIN exit is the only realized loss action today — SL was breached, not preempted. Will reassess admit-side post-LUPIN-fill on next tick when COFORGE, PNBHOUSING, MARICO can be evaluated for partial profit booking near targets."
}
